channel.title: Analytics on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Analytics on Arrans github.io

item.title: duckdb/duckdb
item.description: DuckDB is an analytical in-process SQL database management system

item.title: arp242/goatcounter
item.description: Easy web analytics. No tracking of personal data.

item.title: getlago/lago
item.description: Open Source Metering and Usage Based Billing API ⭐️ Consumption tracking, Subscription management, Pricing iterations, Payment orchestration & Revenue analytics

item.title: dbt-labs/dbt-core
item.description: dbt enables data analysts and engineers to transform their data using the same practices that software engineers use to build applications.

item.title: chartbrew/chartbrew
item.description: Open-source reporting platform to build and share live dashboards from APIs, SQL and NoSQL databases, with powerful AI assistant, scheduling, and embeddable charts 📈📊
